title: Blueberry Pie Tacos
description: A sweet twist on traditional Mexican cuisine, these blueberry pie tacos are a unique dessert option.
instructions: Roll out the pie crust and cut into 4-6 triangles.
Place a triangle in each tortilla, pressing the edges to seal.
Spoon blueberry filling onto one half of each taco.
Drizzle with lime juice and sprinkle with powdered sugar and cinnamon.
Fold the other half of the tortilla over the filling to form a taco.
Serve warm with whipped cream, if desired.
Bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
